channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.24 (Build 20260629)
item.description:
What's New

feat: add per-window Vietnamese on/off override to window title rules

Add InputMethodPolicy (enable/disable) to WindowTitleRule so a matched window or app can force Vietnamese input on or off, independent of the injection method (which controls how text is injected). Wire it through the merged-rule cascade, Codable, the rule editor UI (toggle + IME On/Off badge), and the keyboard event gate.

The matched policy is cached in AppBehaviorDetector and refreshed inside detectInjectionMethod() (focus/title/app/mouse/exclusion/rules changes), so the typing hot path reads it in O(1) without a per-keystroke window-title AX query. engine.vLanguage is synced to the effective state each keystroke so the engine's macro decision (shouldUseMacro) matches the override.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
